title: Device Settings - Check if setting's value persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Device settings values persist after closing settings tab, navigating to home page, returning to settings, and after killing and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
Change a setting value (e.g., toggle ANC, adjust Equalizer, change Transparency Mode).
Close the settings tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping down.
Verify the Home screen is displayed.
Tap on the same device name again to re-enter Device Settings.
Observe the previously changed setting value.
Navigate back to the Home screen.
Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the device name to enter Device Settings again.
Observe the previously changed setting value.
expected: The setting value persists and remains unchanged after closing the settings tab, navigating back to the Home screen, re-entering settings, and after killing and restarting the app.
